query:
SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, se.stationCode AS station_code, se.businessDate,
       COUNT(*) AS station_event_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN se.countForProductivity = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS counted_events,
       SUM(CASE WHEN psd.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detail_join_rows
FROM station_events se
JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND se.eventType = 'complete'
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND se.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name, se.stationCode, se.businessDate
ORDER BY u.name, se.businessDate, se.stationCode;
